name: Separate Dual Icons
description: Allows you to customize your 2nd player

exitDualSwitch.name: Exit Dual Switch
exitDualSwitch.description: Switch between both player's icon sets when exiting dual mode with the player that initiated the exit (example: P2 exits the dual, your player's icon set will remain on P2's configuration indefinitely, until you reverse the effects by exiting dual mode with P1)
